ul.li: DEGRADED consumer_lag check Included in HealthResponse.Warnings[]

ol.li:
For each check result:
If UNHEALTHY: status = UNHEALTHY, break
If DEGRADED and not UNHEALTHY: status = DEGRADED

div.p: Test: Publish to __health_check__ topic HEALTHY: Write succeeds UNHEALTHY: Write fails
Test: Check active consumer groups HEALTHY: ≥1 group has active members DEGRADED: No groups exist UNHEALTHY: Groups exist but no active members
Test: Check DLQ depths vs threshold HEALTHY: All DLQs ≤ threshold DEGRADED: Any DLQ > threshold
Test: Check lag vs threshold HEALTHY: All topics ≤ threshold DEGRADED: Any topic > threshold
